safest_plan.entry_basis: moneytaur grade (2026-06-20), entry $5, verdict pass / score 8
safest_plan.stop_basis: No source gave a stop or invalidation level; none can be cited, so left null rather than invented

stance_by_source.summary: Graded the setup a pass (8/10) with a buy around $5, but gave no profit target and no level that would prove it wrong.

plain_english: Only one source has spoken on this, and it likes the idea of buying near $5, but it never said where it would take profit or where it would admit the trade is wrong. With no exit plan and nothing to check it against, this is a single thin opinion, not a confirmed setup. Wait for a target and a clear point that would invalidate the trade before risking money.
